title: SQL: cast exceeding maximum value, returns null
key_bug_features: casting power function exceeding bigint maximum value
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_power (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value BIGINT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_power (value) VALUES (cast(power(2, 63) as bigint));
SELECT id, value FROM test_power WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_power WHERE value > 0;
